heading: Sort on Embedded Documents Array Fields
body:
To sort the parent documents by an embedded document field, you must do the
following:

- Index the parents of the embedded document child field as the
  [document](bson-data-types-document) type.

- Index the child field with string values within the embedded document
  as the [token](bson-data-types-token) type. For child fields
  with number and date values, enable [dynamic mappings](static-dynamic-mappings) to index those fields automatically.

MongoDB Search sorts on parent documents only. It doesn't sort the child fields
within an array of documents. For an example, see [Sort Example](embedded-document-query-examples).
